name: MATLAB MCP Server
what_it_does: MATLAB MCP server enabling AI agents to execute MATLAB code and interact with MATLAB's numerical computing environment — running MATLAB scripts and functions, querying workspace variables, executing matrix operations and signal processing, and integrating MATLAB's scientific computing capabilities into agent-driven engineering and scientific research workflows.
use_cases: Executing MATLAB scripts and functions from scientific computing agents
Running numerical simulations and analyses from engineering agents
Processing signals and images with MATLAB toolboxes from analysis agents
Solving optimization and equation systems from mathematical agents
Generating plots and visualizations from reporting agents
Validating engineering calculations with MATLAB from QA agents
not_for: Teams without MATLAB license (expensive commercial software)
Python-based scientific computing (NumPy/SciPy MCPs may be better alternatives)
Production systems requiring MATLAB Runtime licensing
best_when: An engineering or scientific agent needs to execute MATLAB code — for numerical analysis, signal processing, control systems, or other domains where MATLAB toolboxes provide unique capabilities.
avoid_when: You don't have a MATLAB license, prefer Python-based scientific computing, or don't need MATLAB-specific toolboxes.

auth.notes: No MCP authentication — connects to locally running MATLAB instance. MATLAB license required. MATLAB Engine for Python used as backend. License validation handled by MATLAB itself.

pricing.free_tier_limits: None — MATLAB requires commercial or academic license
pricing.notes: MATLAB is expensive commercial software. Academic licenses are cheaper. MathWorks licenses are annual subscriptions. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Local MATLAB process — limited by computation complexity and license

known_agent_gotchas: MATLAB license must be valid and activated on the host machine
MATLAB Engine for Python must be installed and configured (complex setup)
MATLAB startup time is significant — first call may take 10-30 seconds
MATLAB licensing: concurrent use may be limited by license type
Code execution is stateful — workspace state persists between calls
Community MCP (srinig) — individual contributor; niche tool for MATLAB users
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local MATLAB process. No network auth. MATLAB license managed by MathWorks. Community MCP. Code executes with full MATLAB/OS permissions — treat like code execution.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local MATLAB. No network auth. License required. Community MCP. Code execution — same trust as shell access.
